$schema-description: Master-sequence TX fixture set per specs/004-baptism-workflow/contracts/master-sequence-wire-format.md §WHO_ARE_YOU app payload (4 B): [0] machineType u8, [1..2] fwType u16 big-endian, [3] reset flag (non-zero = set), length-only reject. Payload bytes are NORMATIVE synthesis targets verified against the slave parser (AutoAddressSlave.c:230-235) — TX fixtures, not bench captures; the live-boundary proof is Phase F. Each parseable entry carries name, 4-byte hex payload, expectsParse, expectedMachineType/expectedFwType/expectedReset, and a provenance source. SET_ADDRESS entries land in commit group A3. Loaded by Tests/Unit/Can/MasterSequenceFixtureTests.fs (T008).
